objective: Go to https://news.ycombinator.com/ and return the top 5 stories on the front page as JSON, each with rank, title, and points.
Go to https://example.com and return the heading text.
Navigate to https://httpbin.org/headers and return the User-Agent and Accept headers from the response JSON.
Navigate to https://www.lesswrong.com, wait a few seconds for it to load, and extract the titles of the first 3 posts on the front page.
Navigate to https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar?action=getcompany&company=Apple&type=10-K&dateb=&owner=include&count=5 and return the most recent filing date and form type.
Navigate directly to https://www.booking.com/searchresults.html?ss=Tokyo&checkin=2026-06-10&checkout=2026-06-12, wait a few seconds, then extract the first 5 hotel names and their prices as JSON.
